body: Does anyone have a good recipe for homemade pizza dough? I want to try making Neapolitan style.
The key is high hydration (65-70%) and a long cold ferment. 24-72 hours in the fridge.
What temperature should the oven be? My home oven only goes to 500F.
500F is fine for home. Use a pizza stone or steel preheated for at least an hour. Aim for 5-7 min cook time.
A pizza steel conducts heat better than a stone. Game changer for home pizza.
